canonical_root_note: canonical_root/canonical_release are the sole canon-authority references in this file and track the org's signed Genesis line (Permaculture-DAO/prometheus-canon, Permaculture-DAO/prometheus-canonical-releases/CURRENT_RELEASE). All other v7.0.x-labelled fields below are internal runtime build/documentary tracking identifiers only and do not assert canon authority; see docs/CANONICAL_LINEAGE_RECONCILIATION.md.
authority_rule: the lowest unresolved gate controls the permitted claim
